name: Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare cookie sheets with oil or spray.
2. Combine the sweet milk, dates, vanilla, egg, and mashed fruit in a blender on low. Blend until uniform.
3. Add to oatmeal in a bowl, stirring with a spoon. Let set for about 5 minutes to moisten the oatmeal.
4. Meanwhile, in a large mixing bowl, combine flours, baking powder, salt, and spices.
5. Turn on oven to 350°F.
6. Add oat mixture to dry ingredients, mixing well.
7. Add raisins, stirring.
8. Drop by teaspoonful onto prepared cookie sheets.
9. Bake for 12 - 15 minutes until lightly browned and a toothpick inserted into the center of the middle cookie comes out clean. Remove from the pan and cool before storing in an airtight container in the refrigerator. Freezes well.
Sweet milk:
2 cups reconstituted nonfat milk (could probably use fresh nonfat or soy or rice milk)
2/3 cup raisins
Combine milk and raisins in a jar, cover, and refrigerate at least overnight, best for 3 days.
Strain milk to remove raisins, which will become mushy and flat.
